recommendedChanges: Squad-rating review (not a formula change): CRO (9 matchups), NED (8 matchups), POR (6 matchups), MEX (4 matchups), ARG (3 matchups), ESP (3 matchups), MAR (3 matchups), URU (3 matchups) consistently underperform their FIFA rank in this model. Worth a Codex review of these teams' player attributes/qualitative_adjustments rather than a global ModelConfig change.
